message:
test: comprehensive expansion across FRX, RGC, parser, governance, IFC,
and core verification test suites (92 files)

Massive test suite expansion spanning virtually every verification surface
in the franken-engine crate. Key areas of coverage added:

Parser verification:
- parser_oracle_gate: 223 new lines of oracle-based correctness checks
- parser_performance_promotion_gate: 208 lines of performance gate tests
- parser_final_readiness_dossier: promotion readiness evidence indexing
- parser_event_ast_equivalence: event→AST equivalence verification
- parser_correctness_promotion_gate: correctness gate criteria tests
- parser_grammar_closure_backlog: grammar closure gap tracking
- parser_benchmark_protocol: benchmark protocol expansion
- parser_api_compatibility_contract: API stability contract tests
- parser_phase0_semantic_fixtures: semantic fixture expansion
- parser_property_regression: property regression checks

FRX (FrankenReact) track tests:
- frx_frankenbrowser_integration_blueprint: +226 lines for C5 evidence
- frx_lockstep_oracle: 255 lines of lockstep replay oracle verification
- frx_flake_quarantine_workflow: +286 lines quarantine mesh expansion
- frx_canonical_react_behavior_corpus: 214 lines React behavior corpus
- frx_governance_evidence_lane_charter: 187 lines governance evidence
- frx_release_operations_gatebook: 189 lines release ops verification
- frx_compiler_lane_charter: compiler lane charter tests
- frx_optimization_lane_charter: optimization lane charter tests
- frx_verification_lane_charter: verification lane charter tests
- frx_toolchain_lane_charter: toolchain ecosystem charter tests
- frx_program_constitution: program constitution verification
- frx_primitive_adoption_schema: primitive adoption schema tests
- frx_incremental_adoption_controls: incremental adoption controls
- frx_pilot_rollout_harness: pilot rollout harness expansion
- frx_ssr_hydration_rsc_compatibility_strategy: SSR/RSC compat tests
- frx_adoption_release_lane_charter: adoption release lane tests
- frx_unit_test_taxonomy + contract: taxonomy classification tests
- frx_track_b through frx_track_f: sprint-level track tests

RGC (Release Gate Controller) verification:
- rgc_cli_operator_workflow_verification_pack: 227 lines CLI workflow
- rgc_fault_injection_chaos_verification_pack: 140 lines chaos injection
- rgc_performance_regression_verification_pack: 77 lines perf regression
- rgc_runtime_semantics_verification_pack: 66 lines runtime semantics
- rgc_statistical_validation_pipeline: validation pipeline expansion
- rgc_performance_regression_gate: gate expansion

Governance and IFC:
- governance_audit_ledger_lifecycle: 309 lines audit ledger lifecycle
- governance_scorecard: 191 lines scorecard verification
- ga_release_delegate_guard: 151 lines release delegate guard
- guardplane_calibration_integration: 139 lines guardplane calibration
- capability_integration: 133 lines capability integration
- capability_witness_publication: 136 lines witness publication
- obligation_integration: 146 lines obligation verification

Core engine tests:
- module_cache: +470 lines cache verification expansion
- frankenctl_cli: 200 lines CLI interaction tests
- e2e_harness: +155 lines end-to-end harness expansion
- receipt_verifier_pipeline_enrichment_integration: 169 lines
- multi_controller_metric_interference: +182 lines interference tests
- runtime_observability: 228 lines observability verification
- control_plane_adapter: 149 lines control plane adapter tests
- eval_pipeline_integration: 141 lines eval pipeline tests
- shadow_evaluation_gate: 141 lines shadow eval gate tests
- replay_counterfactual: 131 lines counterfactual replay tests
- cross_zone_reference: 128 lines cross-zone reference tests
- slot_differential_gate_integration: 128 lines slot differential gate
- fuzz_adversarial: 121 lines adversarial fuzzing
- adversarial_campaign_gate_cli: 118 lines campaign gate CLI tests
- And 20+ additional test files with smaller expansions

Total: ~10,900 new lines of test code across 92 files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
